title: Contributor Covenant Code of Conduct

title: Contributor Covenant Code of Conduct
text: Code Conduct applies within community spaces, also applies individual officially representing community public spaces. Examples representing community include using official e-mail address, posting via official social media account, acting appointed representative online offline event.

text: Code Conduct adapted Contributor Covenant, version 2.1, available https://www.contributor-covenant.org/version/2/1/code_of_conduct.html. what: Calculation and Interpretation of Data Cube Indicator Uncertainty
title: Calculation and Interpretation of Data Cube Indicator Uncertainty
text: dubicube package aims deliver robustness measures assessing applicability biodiversity data cubes, whether general use specific biodiversity indicators. measures facilitate data exploration providing insights data quality reliability. Additionally, package includes functions calculating indicator uncertainty using bootstrapping, well tools interpreting visualising uncertainty biodiversity indicators derived data cubes.
